relationships: ber:Matta tella tɣawsa yellan ɣer-s tiṭṭawin u nettat ur tetthenna c﹖
ber:Matta tella tɣawsa i yellan ur tettenjamed c ad tt-tsawid﹖

ber:Matta i yellan deg lislam ur yelli c deg yisɣanen yyiḍ﹖
